info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the School Management REST API.

Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server URL before running.

request.description: Creates a new school. Returns 201 on success.
Missing / invalid fields — expects 400 with validation errors.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
400 Bad Request

request.description: Returns schools sorted by distance from New Delhi. Page 1, limit 10 by default.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Second page of results — 3 schools per page.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Bad Request
